response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer, but their profile does not match the role's mandatory requirements. Their C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a bachelor thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MySQL/MongoDB), and no fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain depth — the brief RIDE Capital stint was Node.js/TypeScript work in a retail-investment startup, not capital markets. The bulk of their career is web, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, which does not transfer to this engagement.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering career across web, backend, and embedded systems
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and open-source contributions
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic ad-tech backend)
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform in the required depth
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience

key_factors.factor: Solid general engineering fundamentals and practices
